infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Ridodrop Partner needs your location to show you nearby delivery requests and track your deliveries in real-time.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Ridodrop Partner needs continuous location access to track your deliveries even when the app is in the background, ensuring accurate delivery updates for customers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Ridodrop Partner requires location access to provide delivery services, track your route, and update customers about delivery status.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Ridodrop Partner needs camera access to capture delivery proof photos and registration documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Ridodrop Partner needs access to your photo library to upload delivery proof images and registration documents.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Ridodrop Partner needs permission to save photos to your library.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Ridodrop Partner needs continuous location access to track your deliveries even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Ridodrop Partner needs continuous location access to track your deliveries even when the app is in the background.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Ridodrop Partner needs your location to show you nearby delivery requests.

plugins.photosPermission: Ridodrop Partner needs access to your photo library to upload delivery proof images and registration documents.
plugins.cameraPermission: Ridodrop Partner needs camera access to capture delivery proof photos and registration documents.
